original_statement: what was the name of the first ship to become active?
mutated_statement: what was the name of the first vessel to become active and the last vessel to remain inactive?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Scope expansion + Conjunctive addition + Polarity contrast: "ship" → "vessel" (entity replacement) | adds "and the last vessel to remain inactive" expanding the query with a conjunctive clause (scope expansion/addition) | introduces opposite polarity comparison (first to become active vs last to remain inactive) (what was the name of the first ship to become active? → what was the name of the first vessel to become active and the last vessel to remain inactive?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志可见：初始judge_thought（iteration 0）指出预测为空且不正确，tree_and_critic指出缺乏推理和函数使用（missing function usage）。在after_refine阶段agent通过追加一次查询并给出明确推理（比较“years active”和“never in service”条目，返回“Henry J. Kaiser|Henry Eckford”）完成了问题的可解化与回答。agent没有向用户询问澄清，而是通过迭代修正（从空响应到补充查询与解释）将矛盾扩展的问题转为可解问题并给出结果，符合“迭代修正机制”的特征，因此归为此类。
